description: Daily dev log for the 1.00s project

entries.title: Complete UX/UI overhaul — game-as-home, crystal audio, death reveal
entries.summary: Redesigned the entire app flow so the game IS the home screen. Added procedural crystal audio, competitive death reveal, dot speed interpolation, and progressive background darkening.

entries.title: Arcade competition redesign — single-mode app with weekly leaderboards
entries.summary: Redesigned the arcade experience as a single-mode app focused on weekly competition cycles, and added a weekly share card for sharing results.

entries.title: Arcade zen flow, lobby system, mode icons, and loop map overhaul
entries.summary: Massive day — redesigned arcade mode as a zen flow with instant retry, built a full lobby system for arcade and daily challenge, iterated mode nav icons through 6 versions, then overhauled the loop map with a procedural background and 50+ polish passes.

entries.title: Level type redesigns — orbs, arcs, blind zones, and energy paths
entries.summary: Redesigned six level types with new visual mechanics — energy conduit paths, orbital alignment, arc-swing pendulums, ghost orbs, and type-colored glow orbs.

entries.title: Boss icons, star ratings, performance hardening, and closing walls polish
entries.summary: Big day — shipped premium boss orb icons, a full star rating system with celebrations, closing walls gameplay polish, and a comprehensive performance sweep across 5 work streams.
